debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
ι : Type u_2
G : ι → Type u_3
inst✝¹ : Fintype ι
inst✝ : (i : ι) → Group (G i)
A : (i : ι) → Set (G i)
K : ι → ℝ
hA : ∀ (i : ι), IsApproximateSubgroup (K i) (A i)
F : (i : ι) → Finset (G i)
hF : ∀ (i : ι), ↑(F i).card ≤ K i
hFS : ∀ (i : ι), A i ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(F i) • A i
⊢ Set.univ.pi A ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(Fintype.piFinset F) • Set.univ.pi A

proof:
intro z hz
      rw [sq, Set.mem_mul] at hz
      obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, rfl⟩ := hz
      simp only [Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, true_implies] at hx hy
      have h : ∀ i, x i * y i ∈ (F i : Set (G i)) • A i := fun i =>
        hFS i (by rw [sq]; exact Set.mul_mem_mul (hx i) (hy i))
      simp only [Set.mem_smul] at h
      choose f hf a ha hfa using h
      exact ⟨f, Fintype.mem_piFinset.mpr fun i => Finset.mem_coe.mp (hf i), a, 
             fun i _ => ha i, funext hfa⟩
successful_attempts:

      obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, rfl⟩ := hz
      simp only [Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, true_implies] at hx hy
      have h : ∀ i, x i * y i ∈ (F i : Set (G i)) • A i := fun i =>
        hFS i (by rw [sq]; exact Set.mul_mem_mul (hx i) (hy i))
      simp only [Set.mem_smul] at h
      choose f hf a ha hfa using h
      exact ⟨f, Fintype.mem_piFinset.mpr fun i => Finset.mem_coe.mp (hf i), a,
